svg:
<title id="title>Authentication Service Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Authentication failure modes: credential stuffing, token theft, session fixation, and MFA bypass
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
Authentication Service Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">Credential stuffing, token theft, session fixation, and MFA bypass
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. Credential Stuffing
<text x="110 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Attacker <text" x="110" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Botnet <text x="110 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>10K req/s
<text x="180 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Stolen creds
<rect" x="205" y="150 width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6d28d9)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="265" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Auth Service <text x="265 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#c4b5fd>Overloaded <text" x="265" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#c4b5fd">No rate limit
<line x1="330 y1="180" x2="360 y2="180" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Accounts compromised
<text x="390 y="180" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="white>!
<text" x="235" y="290 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">User accounts compromised at scale! <text x="235 y="310" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: No rate limiting, no bot detection <text" x="235" y="330 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Rate limits, CAPTCHA, breach DB checks
<text x="665 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #b45309">2. Token Theft / XSS
<text x="540 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>User <text" x="540" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">Has token
<line x1="595 y1="180" x2="625 y2="180" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> XSS steals
<text x="685 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Attacker <text" x="685" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Stolen JWT
<line x1="740 y1="180" x2="770 y2="180" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Impersonates
<text x="810 y="180" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>API <text" x="810" y="195 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#bfdbfe">Valid token
<text x="665 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Attacker impersonates user! <text" x="665" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Token in localStorage, no XSS protection <text x="665 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: httpOnly cookies, CSP, short token TTL
<rect" x="30" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke-width="2/> 3. Session Fixation
<rect" x="50" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #f5f3ff)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #c4b5fd)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="60" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6d28d9)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="130" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Before Login <text x="130 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#c4b5fd>session_id: ABC <text" x="130" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#c4b5fd">Attacker knows
<line x1="205 y1="425" x2="235 y2="425" stroke="var(--text-theme, #64748b)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)/> User logs in
<text x="315 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>After Login <text" x="315" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">session_id: ABC <text x="315 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>NOT regenerated!
<text" x="235" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Attacker hijacks authenticated session! <text x="235 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Session ID not regenerated after login <text" x="235" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Regenerate session on auth state change
<text x="665 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">4. MFA Bypass
<text x="550 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>MFA Required <text" x="550" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">TOTP/SMS
<line x1="615 y1="425" x2="645 y2="425" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Fallback
<text x="715 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Email Fallback <text" x="715" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Weak verification
<line x1="780 y1="425" x2="810 y2="425" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Bypassed!
<text x="830 y="425" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="white>!
<text" x="665" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">MFA bypassed via weak fallback! <text x="665 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Email/SMS fallback, MFA fatigue <text" x="665" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Strong fallbacks, MFA fatigue detection
<marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)"/>
<marker id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)"/>
